name: Information_Collector

documentation.description:
| PURPOSE
| Collect information packets into an internal data structure
| that can be sorted and traversed.
|
| AUTHOR
| Richard Conn  27 Feb 96  Initial version based on previous work

| PURPOSE
| Add an information packet to the internal data structure.
|
| RAISES
|   DYNAMIC_MEMORY_EXHAUSTED

| PURPOSE
| Return the next packet from the internal data structure based
| on the Iterator.  Advance the Iterator.
|
| RAISES
|   NO_MORE_PACKETS

| PURPOSE
| Return the last information packet in the data structure.
| This packet is either the information packet that was last
| added to the internal data structure via Add_Information_Packet
| or the information packet that is the last one in the list
| as a result of a call to Sort_Information_Packets.
|
| RAISES
|   INTERNAL_DATA_STRUCTURE_IS_EMPTY

| PURPOSE
| Return TRUE iff there are no more packets in the internal
| data structure.
|
| RAISES
|   Nothing

| PURPOSE
| Reset the internal Information_Packet_Iterator to
| the first of the information packets in the internal
| data structure.
|
| RAISES
|   Nothing

| PURPOSE
| Sort the information packets in the internal data structure.
|
| RAISES
|   DYNAMIC_MEMORY_EXHAUSTED
|   INTERNAL_QUICK_SORT_ERROR (should never be raised)

| PURPOSE
| Replace the last information packet in the data structure.
| This packet is either the information packet that was last
| added to the internal data structure via Add_Information_Packet
| or the information packet that is the last one in the list
| as a result of a call to Sort_Information_Packets.
|
| RAISES
|   INTERNAL_DATA_STRUCTURE_IS_EMPTY

formals.code: function "<" (L, R : in Information_Packet) return BOOLEAN
